name: Marshmallow Cream Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups diced peaches (from 5 to 6 medium peaches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the marshmallows in milk using a double boiler.
2. Allow the mixture to cool until it sets.
3. Beat the cooled mixture until smooth, then fold in the whipped cream.
4. Fold in the diced peaches.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared Graham cracker crust.
6. Chill several hours, or until firm.
